nodes.title: REQUIREMENTS
widgets_values:
## Workflow Prerequisites ##

This workflow requires the following custom nodes, which can be obtained via ComfyUI-Manager:

  * Z-Image Power Nodes: https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
  * ComfyUI-GGUF       : https://github.com/city96/ComfyUI-GGUF

 Additionally, ensure you have the following 3 models downloaded and placed in their respective
 directories within your ComfyUI installation:

  z_image_turbo-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/jayn7/Z-Image-Turbo-GGUF/blob/main/z_image_turbo-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/`

  Qwen3-4B-Q8_0.gguf
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-4B-GGUF/blob/main/Qwen3-4B-Q8_0.gguf
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/`

  ae.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `Comfyui/models/vae/`

## More Info ##

- https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
- https://civitai.com/models/2322533/z-image-power-nodes

Created by Martin Rizzo
  GitHub : https://github.com/martin-rizzo
  CivitAI: https://civitai.com/user/Photographer
  Reddit : https://www.reddit.com/user/FotografoVirtual

Three people and a creature stand in front of shelves laden with various items. On the left, a brown-haired woman smiles for the camera, wearing a light brown tank top. Next to her is a humanoid figure with a body made of dark, rocky material and pronounced musculature, resembling onyx. This figure has a large head with sharp features, wears a green cloth sash with white patterns tied around its waist, and has a serious expression, with its eyes subtly glowing red. To the right of this figure is a muscular, older man with a light skin tone, wearing a necklace and with shoulder-length green hair; he wears a white crop top with a pink unicorn painted on it and looks serious. The last individual, on the far right of the image, is a dark-haired woman wearing a black T-shirt and looks serious. In the foreground are several plates of food: a white bowl with a creamy dish covered in red seasoning, a rectangular container filled with what appear to be strips of meat, a white bowl with fried and breaded pieces, and a white plate with several round, light brown cookies. Also in the foreground is a light blue object resembling a human head.

nodes.title: README
widgets_values: This workflow generates a 5-style showcase to demonstrate how different styles can completely change the vibe of the same prompt. I use this figure in the README to a quick, visual idea of the kind of results you can expect when playing around with the styles
